title: CampfireCraft
description: This is Campfirecraft, a Vanilla-Plus based Modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1!
body:
# Hello and Welcome to CampfireCraft, 
a Vanilla-plus focused Modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1! CampfireCraft's main goal is to make Minecraft feel like as complete of a game as possible, with multiple quality of life additions and extensions into areas of the game that have been made empty by newer Minecraft updates. 

**Here are some key features on that CampfireCraft adds:**

- World ore generation has been tripled.

- Enchantments that scale higher can go up to 10. 

- This modpack dislikes the Warden. Under world creation gamerules, you can turn off Sonic boom, and level up your health to 20 hearts(40 hit points)

- With structure generation mods, all generated structures feel in-line with the new minecraft, but not too many to overcrowd the world.

- A plethora of quality of life mods, such as BetterTotem, EasyShulkerBoxes, SpyGlassBinder, ElytraSlot, Quivers from Supplementaries, Villager Leads and much more to address some of the complaints from the minecraft community surrounding the vanilla game.

- The main content expansions are Food (Farmer's Delight) and the End, so it feels feature-filled and in-line with the Overworld and the Nether. This is done with BetterEnd, and EndRemastered.

- Included are preconfigured VanillaPlus resource pack, smoothercreeper and Eclectic tove, to give minecraft a streamlined appearance with the game's new art direction.

- Slight bedrock parity, with Cauldron Dyeing and Bedrock Enchantment features

- Ingame Voice chat mod included

- No Telemetry/Chat reporting.

- Keeping mod overlap as minimal as possible.

This modpack will still go through some updates, and more features will be added in the near future.

Modpack created by MikeTheMike2014. Huge thanks to all the mod authors of all the mods featured in the pack! All I did was assemble the modpack, and make some slight changes.

This modpack is licensed under the Creative Commons NonCommercial-Sharealike 4.0. This modpack is 100% non-commercial. You can do whatever you want, provided it is also non-commercial, and if you directly take out from this modpack, please credit it and give a link to the license.

- For licensing reasons, I must give reference to the original links for the following mods that have an attribution license:
https://modrinth.com/mod/horse-expert - Horse Expert by Fuzs
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory - Structory by Botanydev, Starmute
https://modrinth.com/mod/auditory - Auditory by Sydokiddo
- The included VanillaTweaks Resource was made at https://vanillatweaks.net/
- The included Better Ender Dragon Resource is by Crydigo at https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ender-dragon-revamp
-Featuring Creeper Overhaul (Resource Pack Version) by the Creeper Overhaul Team
(Joosh, GogoMines and JuceDosThings) at https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/creeper-overhaul
https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets - Trinkets by Emi


This modpack was inspired by the likes of other Vanilla Plus Minecraft packs/Vanilla faithful packs, but was assembled completely from scratch. There are no configs/code taken from any other modpack.
